title: Immersive Vehicle - Lindqvist Armored Vehicle
description: This Pack adds vanilla-friendly battle-vehicles with realistic physics to Minecraft
body:
## Coremod "Minecraft Transport Simulator" is required! ([Project Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles)). And MTS Official Pack: ([Project Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles-official-content-pack))

Mod on military equipment that is now used in different battlefields. It can be blown up, crafted, fight against friends or destroy villages. Although it is a mod, it is constructed to be version-independent so it can be used with any version of Forge. 

Just make sure to check back here if you get a major update of MTS.  We change vehicle requirements from time to time so if you find this mod isn't loading it's probably time to update!

![T-72](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaeecfd59b6723d6ff9c412b8eaa89f4d3f86877.png)
